content.text: I'll inspect the cluster's current configuration first, without changing anything.

content.text: Let me get more detail on what's explicitly set, and confirm the true CockroachDB v24.1 defaults so I revert only genuine customizations.

input.command:
echo "=== version ==="; kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach version 2>&1 | head -3
echo "=== statefulset replicas ==="; kubectl -n cockroachdb get statefulset crdb-cluster -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}'; echo
echo "=== full SHOW ZONE for default/system ranges ==="
kubectl -n cockroachdb exec crdb-cluster-0 -- ./cockroach sql --insecure -e "SHOW ALL ZONE CONFIGURATIONS;" 2>&1 | head -60

input.query: CockroachDB v24.1 default zone configuration gc.ttlseconds num_replicas RANGE default meta liveness system

content.content:
Web search results for query: "CockroachDB v24.1 default zone configuration gc.ttlseconds num_replicas RANGE default meta liveness system"

Links: [{"title":"SHOW ZONE CONFIGURATIONS","url":"https://www.cockroachlabs.com/docs/stable/show-zone-configurations"},{"title":"Configure Replication Zones","url":"https://www.cockroachlabs.com/docs/stable/configure-replication-zones.html"},{"title":"Replication Controls","url":"https://www.cockroachlabs.com/docs/stable/configure-replication-zones"},{"title":"Troubleshoot Replication Zones","url":"https://www.cockroachlabs.com/docs/stable/troubleshoot-replication-zones"},{"title":"SHOW ZONE CONFIGURATIONS - cockroachdb | DeepKB","url":"https://deepkb.com/CO_000018/en/kb/IMPORT-1788e75c-a80c-3b73-99a5-dc949bfd8a9d/show-zone-configurations"},{"title":"Configure Replication Zones - cockroachdb | DeepKB","url":"https://deepkb.com/CO_000018/en/kb/IMPORT-cedbfe62-95af-3899-a848-bda1a909c30b/configure-replication-zones"},{"title":"ALTER RANGE","url":"https://www.cockroachlabs.com/docs/stable/alter-range"},{"title":"ALTER PARTITION","url":"https://www.cockroachlabs.com/docs/stable/alter-partition"},{"title":"cockroach/pkg/config/zonepb/zone.go at master · cockroachdb/cockroach","url":"https://github.com/cockroachdb/cockroach/blob/master/pkg/config/zonepb/zone.go"}]

Based on the search results, I can provide information about CockroachDB's default zone configuration values:

## Default Zone Configuration in CockroachDB

The default RANGE configuration includes: range_min_bytes = 134217728, range_max_bytes = 536870912, gc.ttlseconds = 90000, num_replicas = 3.

For system ranges, CockroachDB has different defaults:

- **System Database**: The system database is configured with range_min_bytes = 1048576, range_max_bytes = 67108864, gc.ttlseconds = 90000, num_replicas = 5.

- **Meta Range**: The meta range is configured with range_min_bytes = 134217728, range_max_bytes = 536870912, gc.ttlseconds = 3600, num_replicas = 7.

- **Default System Zone Config**: The DefaultSystemZoneConfig is like the DefaultZoneConfig but has a replication factor of 5 instead of 3.

### Key Points:

The zones for system ranges have an initial replication factor of 5 to make them more resilient to node failure. If there's no applicable database replication zone, CockroachDB uses the default cluster-wide replication zone.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

For system ranges, CockroachDB has different defaults:

- **System Database**: The system database is configured with range_min_bytes = 1048576, range_max_bytes = 67108864, gc.ttlseconds = 90000, num_replicas = 5.

- **Meta Range**: The meta range is configured with range_min_bytes = 134217728, range_max_bytes = 536870912, gc.ttlseconds = 3600, num_replicas = 7.
